items.title: Wall Street funneled $540M into US Solana ETFs in Q4: Bloomberg
items.whyYouShouldCare: The influx of $540M into US Solana ETFs indicates growing institutional interest, potentially enhancing SOL's liquidity and market positioning.

items.title: Ether, solana, XRP jump higher as Trump signals Iran war nearing end
items.whyYouShouldCare: The rise in SOL's value alongside Ether and XRP suggests a positive market sentiment that could bolster Solana's ecosystem usage.

items.title: Global insurance broker Aon tests stablecoin payments with Coinbase, Paxos
items.whyYouShouldCare: Aon's testing of stablecoin payments signals increasing adoption of crypto in traditional finance, which may benefit Solana's ecosystem through expanded use cases.
